```shell
  ./prepare-cert.sh --revoke-delegation "/tmp/canton/certs/delegation_to_revoke.tx" --output "/tmp/canton/certs/revoked_delegation"

  ./prepare-cert.sh --intermediate-delegation --root-pub-key "/tmp/canton/certs/root_public_key.der" --canton-target-pub-key "/tmp/canton/certs/new_intermediate_key.pub" --output "/tmp/canton/certs/new_delegation"
```
